::: navbar
``` {=html}          
<!-- Navbar -->
<nav>
  <a href="#" class="nav-logo">ion<span>data</span></a>
  <ul class="nav-links">
    <li><a href="#about">About</a></li>
    <li><a href="#contact">Contact</a></li>
  </ul>
</nav>
```
:::

::: header-background
``` {=html}          
<!-- HERO -->
<section class="hero">
  <div class="hero-image">
    <img src="images/landing-img.jpg" alt="Hands on a laptop keyboard with charts on screen">
  </div>
  <div class="hero-content">
    <p class="hero-eyebrow">Data science · Analysis · Visualisation</p>
    <h1 class="hero-heading">
      A clear-eyed view on<br>
      <em>how we got here</em><br>
      and where we might go next
    </h1>
    <p class="hero-subtext">iondata supports clients with rigorous data science solutions — from collection and analysis to visualisation and communication.</p>
    <a href="#about" class="hero-cta">
      Learn more
      <svg viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5">
        <path d="M3 8h10M9 4l4 4-4 4"/>
      </svg>
    </a>
  </div>
</section>
```
:::

::: services-strip
``` {=html}
<!-- SERVICES STRIP -->
<div class="services-strip">
  <div class="service-item">
    <div class="service-num">01</div>
    <div class="service-title">Data collection</div>
    <div class="service-desc">Structured sourcing and cleaning of complex, multi-dimensional datasets.</div>
  </div>
  <div class="service-item">
    <div class="service-num">02</div>
    <div class="service-title">Data analysis</div>
    <div class="service-desc">Rigorous statistical and econometric methods applied to real-world questions.</div>
  </div>
  <div class="service-item">
    <div class="service-num">03</div>
    <div class="service-title">Visualisation & communication</div>
    <div class="service-desc">Presenting findings with clarity, precision, and visual impact.</div>
  </div>
</div>
```
:::

::: histographiq-promo
``` {=html}
<!-- HISTOGRAPHIQ PROMO -->
<div class="promo">
  <div>
    <div class="promo-badge">Recently launched</div>
    <div class="promo-heading">HistographIQ</div>
    <div class="promo-sub">Interactive maps with integrated timelines to visualise history.</div>
  </div>
  <a href="https://histographiq.com" class="promo-link">
    Explore the app
    <svg width="13" height="13" viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5">
      <path d="M3 8h10M9 4l4 4-4 4"/>
    </svg>
  </a>
</div>
```
:::

``` {=html}   
<section id="about" class="about">
  <div class="about-left">
    <p class="section-label">About</p>
    <h2 class="section-heading">Data science rooted in economics and real-world research</h2>
    <div class="about-photo-wrap">
      <img src="images/myphoto.jpg" alt="Michael Bratt">
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="about-right">
    <div class="about-body">
      <p><strong>iondata</strong> serves clients with data science solutions to support their understanding and analysis of events, trends, and underlying currents. Services span the entire data science cycle — from data collection through analysis to visualisation and communication.</p>
      <p>Michael Bratt is the founder of <strong>iondata</strong>. He started his career in international trade and economic development, including work at the Swedish <a href="https://www.kommerskollegium.se/en/">National Board of Trade</a> and the <a href="https://unctad.org/">UN Trade and Development (UNCTAD)</a>.</p>
      <p>His more recent work has focused on the calculation and analysis of country and city rankings on issues related to talent, finance, and technology. Recent projects include the <a href="https://fcci.webflow.io">Financial Centres Competitiveness Index</a>, supported by Stern at NYU Abu Dhabi, and the <a href="https://citiesfuturereadinessindex.net">Cities Future Readiness Index</a>. Past projects include <a href="https://www.insead.edu/faculty-research/research/gtci">The Global Talent Competitiveness Index</a> for INSEAD and the <a href="https://futurereadinessindex.com">Future Readiness Economic Index</a> commissioned by Google.</p>
      <p>Michael holds a PhD in Economics from the University of Geneva, where his research focused on <a href="https://onlinelibrary.wiley.com/doi/abs/10.1111/roie.12297">the economic impact of non-tariff barriers to international trade</a>.</p>
    </div>
    <div id="work" class="project-tags">
      <span class="project-tag">Country rankings</span>
      <span class="project-tag">City indices</span>
      <span class="project-tag">International trade</span>
      <span class="project-tag">Econometrics</span>
      <span class="project-tag">Data visualisation</span>
      <span class="project-tag">Web apps</span>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<div class="ruled-divider"><span>iondata · Switzerland</span></div>
```


``` {=html}         
<!-- CONTACT -->
<section id="contact" class="contact">
  <div class="contact-left">
    <h2 class="contact-heading">
      Let's work<br><em>together</em>
    </h2>
  </div>
  <div class="contact-right">
    <div class="contact-detail">
      <span class="contact-detail-label">Email</span>
      <a href="mailto:info@iondata.co">info@iondata.co</a>
    </div>
    <div class="contact-detail">
      <span class="contact-detail-label">GitHub</span>
      <a href="https://github.com/mibratt/">github.com/mibratt</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>
```


::: {#footer}
``` {=html}
<footer>
  <div class="footer-logo">ion<span>data</span></div>
  <div class="footer-copy">© 2025 iondata. All rights reserved.</div>
</footer>
```
:::
